name: k3m-marketplace
description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: core-devtools
plugins.description: A starter plugin to demonstrate marketplace structure

plugins.name: rup-lifecycle
plugins.description: Rational Unified Process lifecycle management — state machine, artifact tracking, and autonomous orchestration for iterative software development

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Plugin development toolkit — scaffolding, validation, skill review, and best-practice guidance for building Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: plugin-dev-sync
plugins.description: Autonomous plugin-dev maintenance — discovers Claude Code features from official and community sources, diffs against plugin-dev, auto-patches, and creates PRs with full reports

plugins.name: cycles
plugins.description: Full spec implementation cycles with filesystem and GitHub backends. Orchestrates spec, plan, track, implement, review, test, verify, and retro.

plugins.name: personal-finance
plugins.description: Personal invoice pipeline — scan Apple Mail for invoices, parse Dutch bank statements (ABN AMRO, ING, Bunq), match payments deterministically, generate EPC QR codes, and view everything in datasette
